name: gen
description: Premium frontend design system for Claude Code — Measurably Enforced Quality with Frontier Capabilities + Preservation-First Ingestion. v3.21 adds `/gen:ingest` for bringing existing projects (codebase or live URL) into the pipeline without losing detail — append-only preservation ledger, per-token DNA confidence, archetype inference top-3, license-gated assets, PII-scrubbed content extraction, component-to-beat mapping, gap report with user-decision prompts. v3.19 adds calibration hardening (shakedown harness + telemetry first-run consent + /gen:recalibrate headless/cron); v3.20 ships 9-axis frontier (agentic UX + agent-trace UI, server-driven UI, brandkit v2 with motion sigils + sonic logo + haptic signature + Figma Variables roundtrip, multi-brand governance with overlay inheritance + drift policy, experimentation layer with quality-gate-aware winner selection, 3D scene composer + Rapier physics + glTF authoring pipeline, commerce depth v2 via Hydrogen + Medusa, observability/SRE via OpenTelemetry + SLO error budgets, edge-native via Vercel Sandbox + BotID). 59 commands, 24-agent pipeline, 287 skills, 8 MCP integrations, 33 Design Archetypes + formal mixing protocol. Two-axis 354-pt quality gate (Design 234 + UX 120). 6 UX Integrity sub-gates (Nielsen heuristics, interaction fidelity, cognitive load, conversion integrity, visual craft quantified, synthetic-user testing with 6 personas). 14-stage pipeline with wave-resume + error taxonomy. 8-layer Context Fabric (L1 scratchpad → L4 ledger → L5 BM25 index → L6 Obsidian KB → L7 calibration store → L8 user memory). 10-track empirical research program. Asset Forge with manifest governance (sha256 cache key + license + DNA coverage); procedural 2D/3D generators (blob/mesh-gradient/voronoi/noise-field/flow-field + glTF box/sphere/torus); Meshy/Flux/Recraft MCP scaffolds. Full-stack delivery: RSC patterns (Next 16 Cache Components + Nuxt Nitro + SvelteKit streaming + Astro Server Islands), API route templates (auth/CRUD/webhook/upload/rate-limited/ai-stream) with Zod + OpenAPI, DB schema gen (Prisma/Drizzle/Payload/Supabase), env var scheme with Zod runtime validation, deploy-preview + canary rolling release (Vercel Rolling Releases GA) + telemetry/RUM + background jobs (Vercel Queues/Cron/Upstash QStash/Inngest). Mobile depth: adaptive icons + splash + store graphics (iOS/Android/Expo), mobile quality-gate (60/120fps, cold <600ms, battery <3%/10min), DNA bridge (SwiftUI + Material You Compose + NativeWind + Flutter), Maestro testing, Expo QR preview, platform idioms. AI-native: voice UI (Web Speech + OpenAI Realtime + ElevenLabs), WebXR AR (USDZ + Scene Viewer + <model-viewer>), real-time personalization (prefers-* + Battery API + Connection API), AI chat via Vercel AI SDK v6 + AI Gateway, Passkeys/WebAuthn, active UX adjustment. Content depth: long-form MDX with voice binding, React Email (9 templates cross-client), Remotion video scripts, interactive calculators/quizzes/configurators, 9-format social asset pack. Integration ecosystem: HubSpot CMS + CRM objects + Marketing/Sales Hub, n8n workflow JSON from NL intent, full Supabase (Auth/Postgres/RLS/Storage/Realtime/Edge Functions/pgvector), Notion/Airtable/Framer-migration/Iconify/Slack/Discord/Salesforce/Pipedrive/Google/Zapier. i18n: translation memory user-global, locale archetype overrides (font-pair matrix per language CJK/Arabic/Hebrew/Thai/Russian/Korean), cultural a11y, Intl API coverage. Advanced a11y: eye-tracking sim, low-bandwidth (2G-viable), voice-control, tremor-friendly, battery-aware, keyboard-task-completion. Legal/ethics: privacy-policy + TOS + a11y statement + AI disclosure (CA AB 2013 + EU AI Act) + cookie-compliance (GDPR/CCPA/LGPD). Plugin self-improvement: opt-in telemetry + skill usage analytics + auto-deprecation. Testing for generated projects: E2E from PLAN.md journeys + visual regression + axe a11y + supertest API. Security hardening: prompt-injection defense, 2026 PII regex, CycloneDX SBOM + license scan, content moderation (NSFWJS + OpenAI), CSP generator + SRI + Trusted Types, API key rotation playbooks, font license tracking. Advanced visual refinement: LPIPS perceptual + layout-diff + animation-path-similarity + cross-framework/cross-browser/print-PDF parity. 3dsvg integration (75 archetype-curated presets + AJV schema + <GenorahSVG3D> wrapper + SVG sanitization + Hero Mark Compliance sub-gate + 30-variant brandkit fan-out). Testing: 69/69 node:test passing, GH Actions validate matrix, self-audit BLOCK/WARN/INFO tiers, pre-push mirror parity. Targets Next.js 16, Astro 6, SvelteKit 2, Nuxt 3, React/Vite 8, Tauri, Electron, Swift/SwiftUI 6, Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform 2.0, Expo SDK 52, Flutter 3.24, React Native. Creates Awwwards SOTD-ready (8.0+) websites with measurably enforced, closed-loop refinement.
